CREATE TABLE test_strings (str1 STRING, str2 STRING, str3 STRING);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES ('Hello', ' ', NULL), ('Goodbye', NULL, 'World'), (NULL, ' ', 'DuckDB');
SELECT concat(str1, str2, str3) FROM test_strings;
SELECT concat('Start', concat(str1, str2), 'End') FROM test_strings;
CREATE TABLE other_strings (str_a STRING, str_b STRING);
SELECT concat(a.str_a, ' ', b.str_b) FROM test_strings a JOIN other_strings b ON a.str2 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT concat((SELECT str1 FROM test_strings WHERE str3 IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1), (SELECT str2 FROM test_strings WHERE str1 IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1)) AS subquery_result;
SELECT concat('Alpha', (SELECT concat(str1, str3) FROM test_strings WHERE str1 IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1)) AS final_result;
SELECT concat(str1, str2) FROM test_strings WHERE str1 IS NOT NULL AND str2 IS NOT NULL;
